title: Advanced time tracking features

posts.author: Shawna123 (Shawna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Can we get advanced time tracking options?

  1. Ability to create a calender/Gantt Chart based on time tracked for each task per month, year, week and ability to label the person who has tracked their time.
  2. Timetracking widget to support tracking for subtasks. Currently only supports main tasks.

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there, my team actually created a custom coded solution in this area. It’s a board view that allows you to choose time tracking columns on multiple boards to pull excel reports from where the time is grouped by person/board. It supports subitems so maybe it’ll help some teams out suffering in this area. It’s a private app and just a prototype for now but you can install it with this link. Let me know if you find it useful.
